evidence_basis.claim: Sensitive tool calls should pause until approved or rejected and be resumable.
Validation must be placed next to the tool creating the side effect.
HITL workflows need persisted interruption/resume state.
High-impact agent actions require human approval and tool-abuse controls.
evidence_basis.source: OWASP AI Agent Security / Excessive Agency

gate_rules.if: action_type in protected_action_types or risk_tier in high/critical
token scope does not match stage_id, action_type, risk_tier, artifact root, and authority hash

gate_rules.then: require post_tool_result_validation_v1, receipt, handoff, and support proof before BTS_COMMIT

gate_rules.if: approval token is reused outside scope

non_goals: Does not authorize execution by itself. It only unlocks the pre-action gate for otherwise valid bounded work.
